description_long: This object is a large, menacing sword with a dramatically curved, single-edged blade reminiscent of a scimitar or falchion. The blade is long, slender, and tapers to a sharp point, with a pronounced curve that gives it an aggressive, sweeping profile. The handle is straight and appears to be made of the same dark material as the blade, featuring a simple crossguard that curves slightly toward the blade for hand protection. The entire object is a uniform dark color, suggesting it is forged from a single piece of metal or finished with a dark coating. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings, giving it a utilitarian and intimidating appearance. The sword's size and design indicate it is intended for two-handed use and would be a formidable weapon in close combat.
description: A large, dark, curved sword with a single-edged blade and a simple crossguard, featuring a sleek, utilitarian design with no ornamentation.
description_view_0: The sword is seen edge-on, showing its thin profile and the straight alignment of the handle and blade.
description_view_1: The full length of the curved blade and the simple crossguard are visible, highlighting the sword's dramatic sweep and dark coloration.
description_view_2: The sword is viewed from the opposite edge, again showing its thinness and the alignment of the handle with the blade.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the sword is visible, displaying the same curved blade and crossguard, with no additional features or ornamentation.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark, simple, no visible wrapping or ornamentation
